untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of shadow height divided by breakout price against median value (custom statistical threshold not available in standard indicators). Exit targets use fixed 78% multiplier (2×78%) which requires custom calculation logic. Volume trend interpretation relative to 'average' volume is approximated with hvol_20 but exact median shadow ratio cannot be computed from allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated 'tall shadow' using upper_wick and lower_wick indicators. Heavy volume represented by hvol_20 > 1.0 and volume > hvol_20. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal spec. Exit conditions default to MA crossover as reversal signal since AUTHOR_SILENT. The precise median shadow calculation and 78% target formula are not translatable to standard indicators.
